# Need CMMC cybersecurity contracting help route

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

## User intent The user needs CMMC, DoD cybersecurity, NIST, or Project Spectrum guidance. ## Best primary route

## When to surface

The user needs CMMC, DoD cybersecurity, NIST, or Project Spectrum guidance.

## Key information

- ## User intent
- The user needs CMMC, DoD cybersecurity, NIST, or Project Spectrum guidance.
- ## Best primary route
- Route to UH APEX CMMC resource links and SBDC cybersecurity hub. For formal compliance, route to qualified professionals.
- ## Ask first
- Are you pursuing DoD or defense-prime work?
- Will the contract involve CUI?

## People and links

- Organizations: Small Business Development Center (SBDC), APEX Accelerator, University of Houston
- Link: <https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/images/apex/Website%20Document/CMMC%20Resources.pdf>

## Next handoff

Route to UH APEX CMMC resource links and SBDC cybersecurity hub. For formal compliance, route to qualified professionals.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
